title: paspalum mollicomum
intro: Paspalum mollicomum, also known as elephant's grass, is a type of tropical grass native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Paspalum mollicomum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Paspalum mollicomum can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
